title: V8 Sandbox Bypass: Argument count inconsistency due to bound args double-fetch in Generate_PushBoundArguments
bounty_rationale: v8 sandbox bypass only demonstrating a read
description_snippet:
### VULNERABILITY DETAILS


#### Summary

(A likely) V8 sandbox bypass, argument count inconsistency due to bound arguments count double-fetch. `Generate_PushBoundArguments()` generates code which double-fetches bound arguments count which allows an attacker to push one additional argument while not
